name: Free Online CSR Generator (Apple Developer CSR) - Pure Tools
description: Free online CSR generator with Apple Developer CSR mode (email + common name) and an advanced mode for RSA/EC PKCS#10 CSRs with SAN/KeyUsage/EKU options.
seoDescription: Free online CSR generator with Apple Developer CSR mode. Enter email + common name to generate an RSA 2048 key pair locally (WebCrypto) and output a PKCS#10 CSR for iOS certificates. Advanced mode supports RSA/EC (P-256/P-384/P-521) with optional SAN/KeyUsage/EKU. No private key uploads.

ui.title: CSR / Certificate Request Generator
ui.description: This tool uses browser WebCrypto to generate keys and a PKCS#10 CSR. Runs completely locally and never uploads your private key/CSR.
ui.appleModeDescription: Apple Developer CSR mode: enter email + common name to generate a PKCS#10 CSR with a local RSA 2048 private key (SHA-256).
ui.appleTutorialTitle: Tutorial: Apply for an Apple Developer Certificate with a CSR
appleTutorialSteps: Enter email + common name, click “Generate CSR”, then download and securely store both the CSR and the private key (critical).
In Apple Developer → Certificates → “+”, choose a certificate type (iOS App Development / Apple Distribution, etc.) and upload the CSR generated here.
To use it in Xcode/CI, the certificate must pair with the private key. You can package `.cer + private key` into a `.p12` using the commands below, then import it into Keychain or use it for signing.
ui.appleTutorialNotes: Tip: exporting a `.p12` will ask you to set a password. Never upload your private key or `.p12` to untrusted sites.
ui.autoSanFromCnLabel: If SAN is empty, use CN as SAN
ui.autoSanFromCnHint: Many CAs only check SAN (and ignore CN), so it is recommended to keep this on.
ui.kuKeyEnciphermentDisabledHint: keyEncipherment is typically not needed for EC/ECDSA (often only digitalSignature).
ui.tip: Tip: Submit the CSR to your CA to request a certificate. Never upload your private key. This tool outputs a standard PKCS#8 private key.
ui.countryLengthError: C (Country) should be a 2-letter country code, e.g. CN/US.
ui.webcryptoUnavailableError: WebCrypto (crypto.subtle) is unavailable. Please use HTTPS and a modern browser.
